title: Pentagon UFO Files Leak Claims 'Non-Human Craft' Hidden in Secret Programme Denied to Top Officials
description: Leaked claims and insider testimony suggest the US government may secretly hold non-human technology, with allegations of a classified program handling recovered UFOs and potential biological entities.

title: UFO Death Pattern Deepens As Insiders Push Claims Of Spiritual And Religious Connection Behind Phenomenon
description: Federal authorities are investigating a pattern of UFO researcher deaths, exploring potential spiritual and religious connections. The White House and FBI are involved, seeking answers to these mysterious occurrences

title: David Wilcock's Death: Sheriff's Office Releases Detailed Timeline Of UFO Researcher's Tragic Suicide
description: His anti-suicide tweet from Dec 2022 has suddenly vanished!

title: Tennessee Rep. Tim Burchett says he’s seen UFO pictures, videos that 'defy' logic
Tennessee Rep. Tim Burchett says he’s seen UFO pictures, videos that ‘defy’ logic
description: "If it's the Chinese, ma'am, they would own us. If it was the Russians, they wouldn't be bogged down in Ukraine," Burchett said.
